questionHtml: The amount of 228Ac in a sample decreases to one eighth ( 1 8 ) of its original value in about 18 hours due to β-decay. Estimate the half-life of 228Ac.

meta.title: The amount of 228Ac in a sample decreases to one eighth ( 1 8 ) of its original value in about 18 hours due to β-decay. Estimate the half-life of 228Ac.
